short_text: Cummins to Tanzim Hasan Sakib, 1 run, full and wide outside off, slashed away towards third man off the outside edge, wi
full_text: Cummins to Tanzim Hasan Sakib, 1 run, full and wide outside off, slashed away towards third man off the outside edge, will be one to finish

short_text: Cummins to Tanzim Hasan Sakib, 2 runs, slower length delivery outside off, beaten by the change of pace as he heaves it
full_text: Cummins to Tanzim Hasan Sakib, 2 runs, slower length delivery outside off, beaten by the change of pace as he heaves it away towards deep square leg, lands short of the two men running in and they pinch two

short_text: Cummins to Taskin Ahmed, 1 run, slower length delivery outside off, sliced away towards cover, no timing again
full_text: Cummins to Taskin Ahmed, 1 run, slower length delivery outside off, sliced away towards cover, no timing again

short_text: Cummins to Taskin Ahmed, 2 runs, slower length delivery outside off, dragged into the leg-side towards mid-wicket with a
full_text: Cummins to Taskin Ahmed, 2 runs, slower length delivery outside off, dragged into the leg-side towards mid-wicket with a mistimed pull, they charge back for two

short_text: Cummins to Tanzim Hasan Sakib, 1 run, length delivery on middle, bunted down the ground to long-on
full_text: Cummins to Tanzim Hasan Sakib, 1 run, length delivery on middle, bunted down the ground to long-on

short_text: Cummins to Towhid Hridoy, Caught by Hazlewood!! A slower length delivery on off-stump, Towhid Hridoy shuffled right acro
full_text: Cummins to Towhid Hridoy, Caught by Hazlewood!! A slower length delivery on off-stump, Towhid Hridoy shuffled right across his stumps looking to scoop it over short fine-leg, there was no pace on it and he couldn't get the timing, ended up scooping it straight into the hands of Hazlewood at short fine-leg. Just the second hat-trick by an Australian in T20 World Cups.

short_text: Hazlewood to Taskin Ahmed, , Wasn't much wrong with this ball, was a yorker on middle, Taskin Ahmed cleared his front-le
full_text: Hazlewood to Taskin Ahmed, , Wasn't much wrong with this ball, was a yorker on middle, Taskin Ahmed cleared his front-leg and managed to carve it right into the gap at extra cover

short_text: Hazlewood to Taskin Ahmed, 2 runs, nails the yorker on middle, Taskin Ahmed bunted it into the off-side and Hazlewood go
full_text: Hazlewood to Taskin Ahmed, 2 runs, nails the yorker on middle, Taskin Ahmed bunted it into the off-side and Hazlewood got around very quickly, just tried to flick it back to the stumps at the bowler's end and Taskin Ahmed would've been gone for all money had he hit, it missed the stumps and they end up taking another

short_text: Hazlewood to Taskin Ahmed, 2 runs, length delivery on middle, heaved away towards deep mid-wicket, they'll get a couple
full_text: Hazlewood to Taskin Ahmed, 2 runs, length delivery on middle, heaved away towards deep mid-wicket, they'll get a couple more

short_text: Hazlewood to Taskin Ahmed, no run, length delivery on middle, Taskin Ahmed looked to heave it away across the line and m
full_text: Hazlewood to Taskin Ahmed, no run, length delivery on middle, Taskin Ahmed looked to heave it away across the line and missed, there was an appeal for caught behind, only polite but it looks like it was off the arm

short_text: Hazlewood to Taskin Ahmed, 2 runs, full and on the pads, Taskin Ahmed glances it away fine, Starc does well on the fine-
full_text: Hazlewood to Taskin Ahmed, 2 runs, full and on the pads, Taskin Ahmed glances it away fine, Starc does well on the fine-leg ropes, they end up taking two

short_text: Hazlewood to Towhid Hridoy, 1 run, low full-toss wide outside off, Towhid Hridoy slices it away to third man off a thick
full_text: Hazlewood to Towhid Hridoy, 1 run, low full-toss wide outside off, Towhid Hridoy slices it away to third man off a thick outside edge, only one and it takes Towhid Hridoy off strike

short_text: Cummins to Mahedi Hasan, Caught by Zampa!! Back of a length on off-stump, at full pace this time, Mahedi Hasan arched ba
full_text: Cummins to Mahedi Hasan, Caught by Zampa!! Back of a length on off-stump, at full pace this time, Mahedi Hasan arched back and opened the face of the bat looking to ramp it and he hit it straight to Zampa down at third man. Now Cummins will be on a hat-trick at the start of the next over!

short_text: Cummins to Mahmudullah, Bowled!!Slower delivery banged into the track outside off, Mahmudullah pressed back and looked t
full_text: Cummins to Mahmudullah, Bowled!!Slower delivery banged into the track outside off, Mahmudullah pressed back and looked to drag it into the leg-side with a pull, only managed to drag it back on to his own stumps off the inside edge. Bangladesh needs someone to stick around with Hridoy and it won't be Mahmudullah.

short_text: Cummins to Towhid Hridoy, 1 run, full and straight on middle, whipped away to deep mid-wicket
full_text: Cummins to Towhid Hridoy, 1 run, full and straight on middle, whipped away to deep mid-wicket

short_text: Cummins to Mahmudullah, 1 run, full just outside off, knocked to mid-off for a quick single, good running once more
full_text: Cummins to Mahmudullah, 1 run, full just outside off, knocked to mid-off for a quick single, good running once more

short_text: Cummins to Towhid Hridoy, 1 run, slower delivery full on off-stump, pushed down the ground to long on
full_text: Cummins to Towhid Hridoy, 1 run, slower delivery full on off-stump, pushed down the ground to long on

full_text: Cummins to Towhid Hridoy, 2 runs, off cutter on a length just outside off, gently tapped towards mid-wicket for a couple, good running

full_text: Stoinis to Towhid Hridoy, 1 run, full and wide outside off, knocked towards cover for a quick single

short_text: Stoinis to Towhid Hridoy, no run, slower yorker just outside off, driven straight to extra cover
full_text: Stoinis to Towhid Hridoy, no run, slower yorker just outside off, driven straight to extra cover

short_text: Stoinis to Towhid Hridoy, ,Such sweet timing once more, full and drifting into the pads, easy pickings these for Towhid
full_text: Stoinis to Towhid Hridoy, ,Such sweet timing once more, full and drifting into the pads, easy pickings these for Towhid Hridoy as he whipped it away up and over deep square leg

short_text: Stoinis to Towhid Hridoy, ,Length delivery on off-stump, bit of a half-tracker and Towhid Hridoy hung back and smacked i
full_text: Stoinis to Towhid Hridoy, ,Length delivery on off-stump, bit of a half-tracker and Towhid Hridoy hung back and smacked it over deep mid-wicket with a short-arm jab

short_text: Stoinis to Mahmudullah, 1 run, full and on leg-stump, clipped away to deep square leg
full_text: Stoinis to Mahmudullah, 1 run, full and on leg-stump, clipped away to deep square leg

short_text: Stoinis to Shakib, Caught&Bowled!! Full and straight on middle, was an off cutter that just seemed to stick into the sur
full_text: Stoinis to Shakib, Caught&Bowled!! Full and straight on middle, was an off cutter that just seemed to stick into the surface as Shakib looked to loft it back down the ground, he was through his shot far too early and it went straight up, Stoinis just continued in his follow through and took it easily just beside the pitch. Bangladesh losing steam as they approach the end of the innings.

short_text: Hazlewood to Towhid Hridoy, 2 runs, length delivery on off-stump, off cutter and it's tucked away towards long leg, they
full_text: Hazlewood to Towhid Hridoy, 2 runs, length delivery on off-stump, off cutter and it's tucked away towards long leg, they scamper back for two

short_text: Hazlewood to Towhid Hridoy, no run, length delivery on off-stump, Towhid Hridoy hangs back looking to run it down to thi
full_text: Hazlewood to Towhid Hridoy, no run, length delivery on off-stump, Towhid Hridoy hangs back looking to run it down to third man but gets an inside edge onto the pads

short_text: Hazlewood to Shakib, 1 run, Slower cutter banged in short, Shakib got into a terrible tangle looking to slap this away i
full_text: Hazlewood to Shakib, 1 run, Slower cutter banged in short, Shakib got into a terrible tangle looking to slap this away into the off-side, it got big on him and lobbed towards point off the splice, there wasn't anyone close enough

full_text: Hazlewood to Towhid Hridoy, 1 run, full and straight on middle, clipped away to deep square leg

full_text: Hazlewood to Shakib, 1 run, length delivery on middle, Shakib backs away and slaps it away towards extra cover

full_text: Hazlewood to Shakib, no run, off cutter on a length on leg-stump, Shakib looks to tuck it into the leg-side and gets a thick inside edge onto the pads

full_text: Zampa to Towhid Hridoy, , Full on off-stump, Towhid Hridoy leant in and swept it hard and right into the gap at cow corner, generated so much power with just his wrists and it raced away

full_text: Zampa to Shakib, 1 run, wrong-un on leg-stump, Shakib backs away to make room before chipping it over cover off the backfoot, no timing on that

full_text: Zampa to Towhid Hridoy, 1 run, length delivery on off-stump, punched out towards cover for one

full_text: Zampa to Shakib, 2 runs, full and just turning down leg, Shakib just used the pace to glance it very fine, chase for the man at short fine-leg but he does well

full_text: Cummins to Towhid Hridoy, no run, full outside off, knocked towards point, tidy over despite the wide

full_text: Cummins to Shakib, , banged in short on middle, too short and will be wide

full_text: Cummins to Shakib, no run, slower delivery full on middle, Shakib looks to clip it into the leg-side but the ball never arrives, he ends up mistiming it back towards Cummins

full_text: Cummins to Towhid Hridoy, 1 run, short of length on middle, Towhid Hridoy gets inside the line and tucks it down to fine-leg

short_text: Zampa to Shanto, Lbw!! LBW appeal and up goes the finger! Shanto decides against the review and walks off. Stump-to-stum
full_text: Zampa to Shanto, Lbw!! LBW appeal and up goes the finger! Shanto decides against the review and walks off. Stump-to-stump line, the Bangladesh captain gets down to sweep and misses this length ball to get hit on the front pad (knee-roll). Decent amount of bounce and it's struck him close to his arm. However, he doesn't challenge the decision. And, ball-tracking shows it to be Good call not to review.

short_text: Zampa to Shanto, no run, 93.2kph, shortish ball down leg, Shanto misses the pull and the ball brushes his body
full_text: Zampa to Shanto, no run, 93.2kph, shortish ball down leg, Shanto misses the pull and the ball brushes his body

full_text: Zampa to Towhid Hridoy, 1 run, 89.6kph, googly on a short of length, flicked through midwicket off the back foot

full_text: Zampa to Towhid Hridoy, , 95.4kph, fuller in length and Towhid Hridoy unleashes the sweep shot. Down on one leg to send it over midwicket. Good shot!

full_text: Maxwell to Shanto, no run, 95.6kph, big shout for lbw, turned down and the Aussies decide against the review. In-dart, Shanto shapes to reverse-sweep and the ball rolls to short fine off his pad. Did he get an edge? Or was the impact outside off?

full_text: Maxwell to Towhid Hridoy, 1 run, 93kph, attacks the sticks and Towhid Hridoy works it through midwicket. The call is for two but the batters decide agains it

full_text: Maxwell to Towhid Hridoy, 2 runs, 89.6kph, tossed up and full in length, driven to deep extra cover for another brace

full_text: Maxwell to Towhid Hridoy, 2 runs, cut to the right of point. The man in the deep sprints to his left to cut it off

full_text: Maxwell to Shanto, 1 run, 90.7kph, Shanto stays leg-side to flay it through the off-side and outside-halves it to deep backward point. "That's good bounce Max," says Wade

full_text: Maxwell to Towhid Hridoy, 1 run, 91.3kph, offie outside off, Towhid Hridoy cuts off the back foot and under-edges towards point

full_text: Mitchell Starc to Towhid Hridoy, 1 run, 140.6kph, short and angling in, a hopping Towhid Hridoy runs it down to third man

full_text: Mitchell Starc to Shanto, leg byes, 2 runs, 42.7kph, shortish ball, Shanto didn't see that coming. He didn't see that coming. Was crouching a bit and pulled hurriedly. The ball hit his arm and rolled towards third man

full_text: Mitchell Starc to Shanto, no run, pitched up, driven straight to extra cover

full_text: Mitchell Starc to Shanto, no run, 137.9kph, short of length ball outside off, Shanto slashes and misses

short_text: Maxwell to Rishad Hossain, Caught by Zampa!! 96.8kph, the batter comes down the track for a wild slog across the line. H
full_text: Maxwell to Rishad Hossain, Caught by Zampa!! 96.8kph, the batter comes down the track for a wild slog across the line. He's nowhere close to the pitch of the ball and loses his shape too in the process. The ball balloons up off the outer edge and Zampa moves back and stays side-on to take a safe catch at short third man. The plan to promote Rishad hasn't worked.

short_text: Maxwell to Shanto, 1 run, 92.6kph, turned with the angle to midwicket
full_text: Maxwell to Shanto, 1 run, 92.6kph, turned with the angle to midwicket

full_text: Maxwell to Shanto, , 93.8kph, hint of spin but it's short and wide. Shanto rocks back and slaps the cut through the covers. Excellent placement

full_text: Maxwell to Shanto, no run, in-angler from round the wicket, Shanto defensively pushes it to the right of the bowler

full_text: Zampa to Rishad Hossain, no run, 91.4kph, Rishad Hossain - promoted - gets down low to slogsweep, misses. There's an appeal for lbw but turned down. Not turning enough and even Wade reckons it's missing leg

full_text: Zampa to Litton Das, Bowled!! Bowled him! Zampa breaks the fifty stand and 92.9kph, scrambled seam leggie, Litton gets down low to sweep hard. No turn, he misses and the ball thuds into his back thigh before ricocheting onto the stumps.

full_text: Zampa to Litton Das, no run, 87.2kph, flighted and full outside off, Litton Das gets forward to slap-drive and miscues it to cover

full_text: Stoinis to Shanto, 1 run, 134kph, full wide of off, sliced over the cover region

full_text: Stoinis to Shanto, 2 runs, 134.6kph, deliberate on this occasion! Opens the bat-face to run this wide-ish ball down to third man. Strac makes a sliding stop to his right

full_text: Stoinis to Shanto, , 132.5kph, delays his stroke to cut. Once again, the ball bounces more than the batsman expects. Gets a top-edge that flies to the left of the keeper before dribbling away to third man for four.

full_text: Stoinis to Shanto, no run, 127.8kph, hits the deck hard and generates good bounce. Shanto looks to slap it away through the covers and the ball bounces over his blade

full_text: Stoinis to Shanto, , 126.6kph, round the wicket, fullish ball just outside the tramline wide of off, left alone

full_text: Zampa to Litton Das, 1 run, 90.3kph, turn! Pitches around off and there's good amount of spin. Litton Das allows the ball to do its bit and dabs it to short third man off the back foot

full_text: Zampa to Shanto, , slightly short, Shanto quick treks back to hammer the pull. Picked the wrong 'un and placed it perfectly to split deep midwicket and long-on

full_text: Cummins to Shanto, no run, 137.1kph, full and slanted across the left-hander, Shanto throws his bat for a drive and is beaten on the outside edge. Just inside the wide tramline. 12 runs off Cummins's opening over!

full_text: Cummins to Shanto, 1 run, 140.8kph, dances down the track to flay this short of length ball through the off-side and mishits it towards mid-off for a single

full_text: Cummins to Shanto, , 134.8kph, banged in short, Shanto sees the lift on it and sways from it. Wade leaps and might have got a glove on it but the ball runs away the hit the fence. Five bonus runs for Bangladesh

short_text: Mitchell Starc to Litton Das, no run, 143.1kph, fuller length ball, driven straight to cover
full_text: Mitchell Starc to Litton Das, no run, 143.1kph, fuller length ball, driven straight to cover

short_text: Mitchell Starc to Litton Das, , Warner flies to his left and the ball eludes him. Back of a length with a bit of extra b
full_text: Mitchell Starc to Litton Das, , Warner flies to his left and the ball eludes him. Back of a length with a bit of extra bounce, Litton Das glides it with an opened bat-face. Aerial and just wide of the short third man fielder before running away to the fence

short_text: Mitchell Starc to Litton Das, 2 runs, 137.4kph, walks forward and across, takes it on the full and drives through extra
full_text: Mitchell Starc to Litton Das, 2 runs, 137.4kph, walks forward and across, takes it on the full and drives through extra cover for a couple of runs. Good timing but the outfield isn't quick

short_text: Mitchell Starc to Litton Das, , is that the pressure releaser? Shortish ball, Litton Das goes after it with a pull shot.
full_text: Mitchell Starc to Litton Das, , is that the pressure releaser? Shortish ball, Litton Das goes after it with a pull shot. Off the lower part of the bat but he's managed to drag it over midwicket. Much-needed boundary for Litton

short_text: Mitchell Starc to Litton Das, no run, 141.8kph, hint of shape into the right-hander and Litton Das can only defend it ba
full_text: Mitchell Starc to Litton Das, no run, 141.8kph, hint of shape into the right-hander and Litton Das can only defend it back to the bowler

short_text: Mitchell Starc to Litton Das, no run, 140.5kph, fuller than a length, Litton Das is half-forward to knock it towards mid
full_text: Mitchell Starc to Litton Das, no run, 140.5kph, fuller than a length, Litton Das is half-forward to knock it towards mid-on/midwicket, gets a leading edge towards mid-off

full_text: Hazlewood to Shanto, no run, 142kph, very full outside off, Shanto drives it to cover off the bottom part of the bat

full_text: Hazlewood to Litton Das, 1 run, 135.6kph, attempts another premeditated scoop, the line is wide of off on this occasion and the ball dies down on the off-side off his glove

short_text: Hazlewood to Litton Das, , 133.6kph, walks across a long way to try and scoop. Hazlewood hits the deck hard and bowls th
full_text: Hazlewood to Litton Das, , 133.6kph, walks across a long way to try and scoop. Hazlewood hits the deck hard and bowls this back of a length ball down leg

full_text: Hazlewood to Litton Das, no run, 135kph, pushes this length ball straight to cover point

full_text: Hazlewood to Shanto, 1 run, 137.7kph, back of a length marginally outside off, dabbed towards short third man

short_text: Hazlewood to Shanto, , that's an authoritative hit! Short of a length ball, Shanto skips down the track, moves leg-side
full_text: Hazlewood to Shanto, , that's an authoritative hit! Short of a length ball, Shanto skips down the track, moves leg-side in the process and swings his willow hard to wallop it over long-on for a 74m six

short_text: Mitchell Starc to Shanto, 1 run, 142.9kph, pitched up, driven back to the bowler who fails to stop it cleanly. Parries i
full_text: Mitchell Starc to Shanto, 1 run, 142.9kph, pitched up, driven back to the bowler who fails to stop it cleanly. Parries it towards mid-off and Cummins slides in and has a shy at the sticks at the bowler's end. No direct-hit and Shanto would have probably made his ground any way

short_text: Mitchell Starc to Litton Das, 1 run, 139.9kph, length ball pushed across the right-hander, Litton Das runs it down to th
full_text: Mitchell Starc to Litton Das, 1 run, 139.9kph, length ball pushed across the right-hander, Litton Das runs it down to third man and it's taken him 10 balls to open his account

short_text: Mitchell Starc to Litton Das, no run, 141.4kph, full and slanted across the right-hander, Litton Das leans across and dr
full_text: Mitchell Starc to Litton Das, no run, 141.4kph, full and slanted across the right-hander, Litton Das leans across and drives to point again

short_text: Mitchell Starc to Litton Das, no run, walks forward and across does Litton Das, converts it into a low full toss and dri
full_text: Mitchell Starc to Litton Das, no run, walks forward and across does Litton Das, converts it into a low full toss and drives with an opened bat-face. Makes good contact but picks out the man at point

short_text: Mitchell Starc to Litton Das, no run, opens the bat-face to squeeze this inswinger towards the point region
full_text: Mitchell Starc to Litton Das, no run, opens the bat-face to squeeze this inswinger towards the point region

full_text: Mitchell Starc to Shanto, 1 run, very full, curls away late towards middle and off and Shanto bunts it towards mid-on for a quick single

full_text: Mitchell Starc to Shanto, , 141kph, darts a full delivery down leg, well past Shanto's attempted flick

full_text: Hazlewood to Litton Das, no run, similar length, good bounce outside off and Litton Das punches it to backward point

full_text: Hazlewood to Litton Das, no run, with a slip in place, Hazlewood starts with a in-slanting back of a length ball, the batter defends it into the leg-side

short_text: Mitchell Starc to Shanto, , 141.9kph, Bangladesh and Shanto get off the mark. Starc serves width and the length is short
full_text: Mitchell Starc to Shanto, , 141.9kph, Bangladesh and Shanto get off the mark. Starc serves width and the length is shortened as well. Allows the batter to free his arms and the skipper flays it with the swing over backward point

short_text: Mitchell Starc to Shanto, no run, 141.3kph, very full, Shanto isn't forward and pushes this outswinger back towards the
full_text: Mitchell Starc to Shanto, no run, 141.3kph, very full, Shanto isn't forward and pushes this outswinger back towards the bowler. The Bangladesh captain has a look at the toe-end of his bat

full_text: Mitchell Starc to Shanto, no run, pitched up, curls away late from leg and Shanto is watchful in his defence

short_text: Mitchell Starc to Tanzid Hasan, Bowled!! Fullish length ball, outswinger, keeps a bit low, Tanzid Hasan stays back to bl
full_text: Mitchell Starc to Tanzid Hasan, Bowled!! Fullish length ball, outswinger, keeps a bit low, Tanzid Hasan stays back to block. The ball trims the cue-end and deflects onto the middle-stump. Perfect start for Australia! Tanzid can't believe it. He should have played that off the front foot.

short_text: Mitchell Starc to Tanzid Hasan, no run, 139.3kph, another outswinger, very full. In fact, it's a low full toss and Tanzi
full_text: Mitchell Starc to Tanzid Hasan, no run, 139.3kph, another outswinger, very full. In fact, it's a low full toss and Tanzid Hasan guides it to backward point with an opened bat-face

short_text: Mitchell Starc to Tanzid Hasan, no run, 139kph, yorker length, curlsaway just outside off and Tanzid Hasan squeezes it t
full_text: Mitchell Starc to Tanzid Hasan, no run, 139kph, yorker length, curlsaway just outside off and Tanzid Hasan squeezes it to the left of backward point where Maxwell dives full-length to stop it

short_text: Taskin Ahmed to Warner, 1 run, short and at the body, Warner stays on the front-foot as he played the pull, on the bounc
full_text: Taskin Ahmed to Warner, 1 run, short and at the body, Warner stays on the front-foot as he played the pull, on the bounce to deep backward square leg

short_text: Taskin Ahmed to Warner, , , Warner brings up his fifty in style, they're racing away towards the target now - half-volle
full_text: Taskin Ahmed to Warner, , , Warner brings up his fifty in style, they're racing away towards the target now - half-volley at the pads, Warner picked the length early and then whipped it over mid-wicket for a maximum

full_text: Rishad Hossain to Maxwell, no run, full-toss from Rishad and Maxwell fails to put it away, driven straight to the fielder at cover,

short_text: Rishad Hossain to Maxwell, 2 runs, Maxwell is looking in good touch, , the leg-break from Rishad, but it's a tad too ful
full_text: Rishad Hossain to Maxwell, 2 runs, Maxwell is looking in good touch, , the leg-break from Rishad, but it's a tad too full and lets Maxwell get under it on the slog-sweep, placed it through mid-wicket and a diving stop prevented the boundary

short_text: Rishad Hossain to Maxwell, , , that's a Maxwell special - was tossed up well outside off, he leant across, brought the b
full_text: Rishad Hossain to Maxwell, , , that's a Maxwell special - was tossed up well outside off, he leant across, brought the bottom-hand into play and then shovelled it hard and flat, sending it screeching across the ropes at wide long-on

full_text: Mustafizur to Warner, , , banged in short and angling across the left-hander - Warner gets on top of the bounce and then crunches the pull over mid-wicket, second boundary of the over, turning out to eb an expensive one from Mustafizur

full_text: Mustafizur to Warner, no run, short of a length and angling across the left-hander, Warner can't beat backward point with the cut

full_text: Mustafizur to Maxwell, , , on a good length and well wide of off - Maxwell leans into the drive, presents the full face of the bat and finds the gap wide of cover

full_text: Rishad Hossain to Maxwell, 1 run, Maxwell brings out the reverse sweep straightaway, and only a diving stop at backward point prevents the boundary, was full and just outside off - he rolled his wrists over the shot

short_text: Rishad Hossain to Mitchell Marsh, Lbw!! Mitchell Marsh has been given OUT LBW, looked adjacent, . Another pre-empted swe
full_text: Rishad Hossain to Mitchell Marsh, Lbw!! Mitchell Marsh has been given OUT LBW, looked adjacent, . Another pre-empted sweep and he's pinged bang in front of middle and leg. No bat and UltraEdge confirms it. Onto ball-tracking: . Rishad is giving his team some hope - was pushed through quicker, the wrong 'un which skidded through and beat Marsh's sweep, was clipping the leg-stump with the angle and umpire Richard Illingworth's decision is vindicated.

full_text: Rishad Hossain to Mitchell Marsh, no run, the leg-break, pushed through flatter and quicker - Marsh played inside the line and lets it go

short_text: Rishad Hossain to Head, Bowled!! Beautifully bowled and Rishad has struck. Nicely tossed up on off, was slower through t
full_text: Rishad Hossain to Head, Bowled!! Beautifully bowled and Rishad has struck. Nicely tossed up on off, was slower through the air and spun back into the left-hander, Head backed away on the cut and is undone by the lack of pace, was through with the shot and let the ball crash into the off-stump. Bangladesh have struck almost immediately after the rain break.

full_text: Rishad Hossain to Warner, no run, a wild swipe from Warner - was the wrong 'un and he was looking to slog across the line, didn't miss the off-stump by much

full_text: Rishad Hossain to Warner, , nicely played, the switch-hit from Warner - changes stance, gets on top of the bounce and beats slip with the sweep, runs away to the ropes in a hurry

full_text: Mahedi Hasan to Warner, ,Full outside off, Warner brings out the switch-hit second ball, gets it very fine and to the third man ropes, was slightly top-edgish but it does the job

short_text: Mahedi Hasan to Warner, no run, full on off-stump, Warner prods forward and knocks it into the covers
